feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP Remote Function Call (RFC)
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP Remote Function Call (RFC) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Re: VALUATOIN CLASS MSG '' NO VALUES FOUND''
entry.content: Hi Sanil, Thanks for the reply. ill check that.. btw now the issue is am not able to see the valuation class which i created in the drop down. not sure how to bring it to the drop down

entry.title: How can ı find technical name field in all tables in SAP
entry.content: How can I find the EBELN(technical name) field in all tables in SAP? (with abap)

entry.title: Re: Technical Objects - Display like IH01
entry.content: We are using at this moment the Fiori environment for almost two years and we really are missing an app for the Asset Viewer. Indeed in GUI there was IH01, form here you could navigate to other environment. (notificiatons, orders, tasklist etc) In Fiori they have tried to build it as Ultimo, but SAP did not succeed. It is a pity because Asset Viewer do have all items to become a succesfull navigation tool for Techncial Objects. I already reached out to SAP in the past, but no reaction. There was a promise to do something in Q1-2024, but I never heard anything anymore. The basis of Technical Object has disappeared in Fiori.

entry.title: How can we find which tables contain the field ZZEBELN.
entry.content:
Hi everone,
How can we find which tables contain the field ZZEBELN?

entry.title: Customer Invoice Volume Reports shows 0 quantity for Follow-Up Invoices/Credit Memos.
entry.content:
In the "Invoiced volume" report, we have a problem with the quantities invoiced 

For credit memos, the quantities are not displayed. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Customer Invoice Volume Reports shows 0 quantity for...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

  • Follow up invoices are tracked within reporting with 0 value.
  • This is intended to keep the total quantity of the complete sales process correct.
  • Credit memos created from Customer Returns and manual Invoices/Credit Memos show the actual quantity. 

Please Note: For invoices the quantity will be displayed in the field "Invoice Quantity" and for Credit Memos the quantity will be displayed in the field "Credit Memo Quantity".

  • This is the intended system behavior.
  • The purpose is to allow for overall sales tracking with correct quantity values. Therefore the original invoice and follow up invoice do not exceed the delivered quantity.

Thanks & Regards,

Arjun T H

SAP Product Support

entry.title: How to use the SAP Cloud ALM Real User Monitoring "Analysis" view?
entry.content:
Hi,

How do we use the SAP Cloud ALM Real User Monitoring "analysis" view?
How do we use Real User Monitoring in general, what is the workflow?

Can we add or change the columns in the "Analysis" view? 
How can we see more detailed information "such as request time stamps" using the "Analysis" view?

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to use the SAP Cloud ALM Real User Monitoring "An...
entry.content:
The “Analysis” page is intended to give an eagle eye view for requests.
It offers two views, the “table” view (the default when opening the screen) and the “graph” view.
Different metrics are available in the “analysis” screen, but the data is always aggregated.
 
It is impossible to show a time stamp for aggregated data. 
Showing any kind of time stamp for an aggregate would be misleading, as an aggregate comprises multiple different requests at different times. 
Other data points (e.g. a user, a request, the number of executions) can easily be aggregated and displayed in a sensible way.
 
If time stamps are required, data from the “Analysis” screen (e.g. user name, request, etc.) can be used to perform filtering in the “Request” screen so the user can to drill down into the request and find the time stamp. 

All user names will be anonymised unless the user accessing Real User Monitoring has at least role collection "Real User Analyst Sensitive".

For more information about Real User Monitoring, its metric content, and how to use it, please see these Real User Monitoring specific links from the SAP Cloud ALM for Operations Expert Portal:

  • Overview
  • Content
  • How-To Videos

entry.title: What is the significance of creating an implementation class for a Behavior projection in SAP RAP?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I noticed that for the behavior projection of manage sales order v2 RAP app i.e. C_SALESORDERMANAGE, there is an implementation class maintained and certain actions are defined below. If there are already actions defined in R_SALESORDERTP which are also visible in UI app, why do we need to define actions in projection view and also create another implementation class there?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: ECC VS HANA For Plant maintenance Module
entry.content:
We are using at this moment the Fiori environment for almost two years and we really are missing an app for the Asset Viewer. Indeed in GUI there was IH01, form here you could navigate to other environment. (notificiatons, orders, tasklist etc) In Fiori they have tried to build it as Ultimo, but SAP did not succeed. It is a pity because Asset Viewer do have all items to become a succesfull navigation tool for Techncial Objects. I already reached out to SAP in the past, but no reaction. There was a promise to do something in Q1-2024, but I never heard anything anymore. The basis of Technical Object has disappeared in Fiori.

Kind Regards,

Maico

entry.title: SAP Automation Pilot error : execution has failed
entry.content:
I am getting error while doing  Mass Restart Cf Apps command in sap automation pilot:

[invalid_grant] Failed to obtain oAuth 2.0 token: User authentication failed: Unauthorized Token  Response code: 401

I am getting same error while trying any command.

#SAP Automation Pilot

entry.title: Re: Is GMPS status mandatory for Work Order settlement if...
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using 2021, but SAP cannot put a condition saying GMPS is mandatory, unless there might be optional configuration introduced in 2022, not to TECO order without GMPS.

Check any enhancement is available or setup in your system, else raise a OSS message.

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: Material Substitution in ORDRSP IDoc
entry.content: You would need to make use of a user exit to populate the additional data you would like to associate.

entry.title: Opening & Closing Remarks printing in Crystal Report
entry.content:
I wish to print the Opening & Closing Remarks fields in crystal report but maintaining the fields' format.

In fact, the users introduce information in these two fields with a special formatting (paragraphs, tabulations...). Wondering whether it is possible to keep their format while printing them.

Thanks in advance.

SAP Business One, version for SAP HANASAP Crystal Reports

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI Odata adapter error 'WstxUnexpectedCharException'
entry.content: Check the logs to see the URL that is being invoked because it indicates an incorrect & character at position 128.

entry.title: Re: Opening & Closing Remarks printing in Crystal Report
entry.content: Solved!

entry.title: Re: Issue in reversing the supplier invoice from "Create...
Re: Issue in reversing the supplier invoice from "Create supplier invoice" fiori app
entry.content: Hey varun, I'm facing the same issue here. were you able to find a solution? if so, please let me know the fix. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Random
entry.content: Search "random" in the official ABAP documentation.

entry.title: Re: How can ı find technical name field in all tables in SAP
entry.content: View DD03VV, search on tabclass = 'TRANSP' and fieldname = 'EBELN'
